title: citronella sarmentosa var. lucidula
intro: Citronella sarmentosa var. lucidula, also known as the Philippine citronella, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Cymbopogon, a genus of aromatic grasses. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Citronella sarmentosa var. lucidula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
